response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video was observed to be a static image with no audio content. 2. Text analysis identified the content as a birthday celebration message from the VTuber Sakura Miko ('さくらみこ'). 3. Since no vocal music is present, no lyrics search was performed.
response.global_summary: A static promotional image for Sakura Miko's 2026 birthday live event. There is no audio or vocal music in this video.
